title: Version
description: A representation of a Version, serialized in JSON format

variant.description: Variant of the version. Represents branched-off content, and 0 should represent a mainline version, which is also the default value.

major.description: Major component of the version. Starts at 0, which is a non-released version. Changes from 1 onwards represent a breaking change, no compatibility guaranteed.

minor.description: Minor component of the version. Starts at 1. When major is not 0, changes to this do not represent a breaking change, and backwards compatibility should be mostly guaranteed, requiring minimal changes (i.e. removing usage of deprecated APIs).

patch.description: Patch component of the version. Starts at 0. When major is not 0, changes to this are not allowed to introduce any changes to the API, only underlying changes. Defaults to 0.
